channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: TD Cuts Bitcoin Giant Strategy's Price Target, Calls Ethereum Treasury Sharplink a ‘Buy’
item.description: TD Cowen remains positive on $55 billion Bitcoin treasury pioneer Strategy, despite trimming its price target yet again.

item.title: 'AI Should Advance Mankind, Not Destroy It': Why Florida Is Taking Aim at OpenAI
item.description: The Florida attorney general's probe into AI giant OpenAI cites national security and child safety risks tied to ChatGPT.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Ex-SEC, Coinbase staffer becomes Securitize president
item.description: Newly appointed company president Brett Redfearn briefly worked as Coinbase’s head of capital markets and served for more than three years at the SEC.

item.title: Bitcoin rally extends toward $73K despite concerning US economic data
item.description: Bitcoin continues to show strength even as US recession risks rise and the fragile ceasefire with Iran begins to show cracks.

item.title: Pepe May Follow Dogecoin to Wall Street—But ETF Investors Aren't Buying Meme Hype
item.description: There's now an application for a Pepe ETF, but Dogecoin funds have generated tepid inflows, according to CoinShares' James Butterfill

item.title: US Treasury expands cybersecurity threat intel to crypto industry
item.description: The Treasury Department said the move reflects increases in frequency and sophistication of actions targeting digital asset platforms.

item.title: Bitcoin tops $72,000, but Circle and Bullish drop sharply after downgrades
item.description: Eased Middle East tensions pushed crypto prices and U.S. stocks sizable hjigher.

item.title: Circle stock sinks 10% amid analyst downgrade, Drift Protocol probe
item.description: The stablecoin issuer faces pressure after a stock downgrade and Drift Protocol exploit fallout, raising concerns over USDC exposure, crypto regulation and market risk.

item.title: These 3 crypto stocks could actually beat bitcoin ETFs, says TD Cowen
item.description: Analyst Lance Vitanza is betting that digital asset treasury"companies like Nakamoto, SharpLink and Strive can outperform standard crypto ETFs by aggressively stacking coins and capturing staking yields.

item.title: OpenAI Plans Advanced Cybersecurity Product—With 'Trusted Access' Only
item.description: Both OpenAI and Anthropic are restricting access to their most powerful cybersecurity capabilities, releasing them only to vetted organizations.

item.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum Open Interest Rises, Signaling Renewed Risk Appetite: CryptoQuant
item.description: Bitcoin and Ethereum are trading higher as open interest rises, providing some optimism about investors' risk-on appetite.

item.title: ETH valuation metric hits level not seen since 2022: Is rally to $2.5K next?
item.description: A rare signal from an ETH price indicator suggests Ether is undervalued, while demand in spot and futures markets hints at a rally to $2,500.

item.title: US lawmakers ask if Trump dangling memecoin event attendance: Report
item.description: With a potential scheduling conflict, several senators want to know if the president plans to attend a luncheon for memecoin holders in Florida or just seeking to generate fees.

item.title: CoreWeave’s $8.5B loan shows how AI is replacing crypto mining finance
item.description: CoreWeave’s financing highlights Wall Street’s shift away from volatile, hardware-backed crypto lending toward cash-flow-driven AI infrastructure, according to TheEnergyMag.

item.title: Pyth Network looks to disrupt data hegemony with new marketplace
item.description: With market pricing data currently monopolized by a few players, Pyth seeks to democratize access with a pay-on-demand model beginning with seven big-name providers.

item.title: YouTube Now Lets You Create Your Own AI Deepfakes
item.description: The new YouTube Shorts feature lets creators generate short videos using a realistic digital recreation of their own face and voice.

item.title: Old Bitcoin whales sold $271M in BTC: Is the crypto rally at stake?
item.description: Bitcoin whales sold $270 million in BTC on Sunday, but the steady absorption of supply by traders should help bulls maintain their hold on the market momentum.

item.title: OpenAI Says Enterprise AI Is Already 40% of Its Revenue Amid ‘Agentic Workflow’ Shift
item.description: OpenAI CRO Denise Dresser says enterprise now makes up more than 40% of the company's revenue as companies turn to teams of agents.

item.title: Kalshi now controls 89% of the U.S. prediction market as regulated trading takes over
item.description: As Kalshi captures a dominant 89% of the market, a high-stakes legal battle between federal regulators and individual states will determine if these platforms are treated as sophisticated financial tools or just another form of gambling.

item.title: Meta, CoreWeave Shares Rise After Expanding $21 Billion AI Cloud Deal
item.description: Both Meta and CoreWeave logged stock gains Thursday after expanding their existing AI deal, now valued at $21 billion.

item.title: Google's PaperOrchestra AI Converts Lab Notes Into Publication-Ready Research Papers
item.description: The framework automates the complex process of transforming raw research materials into polished academic manuscripts.

item.title: Another Solo Bitcoin Miner Hits the Jackpot, Scoring $225K BTC Reward
item.description: An individual Bitcoin miner hit the lottery overnight, scoring a $225,000 BTC reward when they found a block.

item.title: Securitize names ex-SEC official Brett Redfearn as president ahead of public listing
item.description: Brett Redfearn joins as president as the firm works to build regulated infrastructure for tokenized assets.

item.title: Potential buyers are circling Winklevoss-backed crypto exchange Gemini
item.description: Interested parties are considering buying select parts of the business, particularly its shuttered European operations, to secure regulatory licenses, rather than pursuing a full takeover.

item.title: U.S. Treasury to loop in crypto sector on hacker warnings shared with traditional firms
item.description: The Department of the Treasury announced it's letting crypto firms sign up for timely information-sharing on cybersecurity threats.

item.title: TON blockchain claims sub-second finality with Catchain 2.0 upgrade
item.description: Transactions on the Open Network layer-1 blockchain protocol previously took about 10 seconds to settle before the Catchain 2.0 consensus upgrade.

item.title: Is Iran Collecting Hormuz Tolls in Bitcoin? This Crypto Intelligence Firm Is Skeptical
item.description: TRM’s Ari Redbord expressed skepticism that Iran and affiliated actors are accepting Bitcoin for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Three reasons why Ether traders expect ETH to hold above $1.8K
item.description: Onchain and technical data hint that $1,800 may have been the macro price bottom for Ether. Is there sufficient bullish momentum for a rally to $3,000?

item.title: Binance rolls out prediction markets for app using Predict.fun
item.description: The crypto exchange is mounting a challenge to platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket, offering ”gasless” trades as it seeks a share of the $20 billion prediction market.

item.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Slams Crypto Industry 'Nihilists' as Clarity Act Remains in Limbo
item.description: Several obstacles to the Clarity Act, which have remained unsolved for months, stand in the way of its passage before a looming deadline.

item.title: MarketVector and Coinbase launch index tracking Bitcoin and tokenized gold
item.description: A new Bitcoin–gold index highlights shifting views on crypto’s role as a store of value as correlations with equities increase and gold outperforms.

item.title: Bitcoin shoots above $72,000 as optimism grows over Middle East ceasefire
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu reportedly has signaled a willingness to negotiate with Lebanon.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Uplisted to NYSE as Ethereum Firm Expands Buyback Program to $4 Billion
item.description: Ethereum treasury giant BitMine Immersion Technologies upped its share buyback program to $4 billion and was uplisted to the NYSE on Thursday.

item.title: OpenAI Pauses UK AI Tech Team-Up With Nvidia Over Energy Costs, Regulation
item.description: OpenAI's planned Stargate project with Nvidia and Nscale aimed to deploy thousands of GPUs to support AI workloads in Britain.

item.title: Stablecoin Giant Tether Launches Toolkit for Building Local, Offline AI Apps
item.description: Tether’s new toolkit lets developers build AI applications that run entirely on-device, marking an expanded push into decentralized AI.

item.title: Bithumb Files to Seize Bitcoin From Holdouts After $43B Blunder
item.description: The South Korean exchange is pursuing formal legal remedies to recover 7 BTC after voluntary return requests failed.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto’s Performance Q1
item.description: Q1 digital asset review: geopolitical conflict and Fed caution led to declines, but institutional flows and regulatory clarity returned in March, building a durable foundation for Q2

item.title: Nunchuk Launches Open-Source Bitcoin Tools for AI Agents With 'Bounded Authority'
item.description: Nunchuk releases open-source tools that allow AI agents to interact with Bitcoin wallets while keeping humans in control over spending.

item.title: Stablecoin volumes to reach $719T by 2035 as generational wealth shift speeds up crypto adoption
item.description: Massive transfer of wealth to younger, crypto-native users and rising payment volumes challenge dominance of Visa and Mastercard

item.title: Project Crypto is designed so once Congress acts, @SECGov & @CFTC are ready to implement the CLARITY Act. @SecScottBessent is right. It's time for Congress to future-proof against rogue regulators & advance comprehensive market structure legislation - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9aLVNzQk9xcWJlSjRtZUQtRGJMcjl1Mlg1T21peldWQWx0cWo3RVE3UHJySTRDT2dfRUdQQnpVMmRWMjRFbmFDZE84bWRYaUVvb3U1SWQ5YmlZZEZtbXVKM2NmUTBuUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Project Crypto is designed s…

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine uplists to NYSE, expands buyback authorization to $4 billion
item.description: The company holds nearly 4% of ether's (ETH) total supply, but shares have struggled alongside that crypto.

item.title: UK-led Operation Atlantic freezes $12M in crypto scam proceeds
item.description: Operation Atlantic, a joint US, UK and Canadian operation, froze more than $12 million tied to crypto approval phishing and identified over 20,000 victims.

item.title: 🐋 WHALE ALERT: Whale opens 20x leveraged shorts on Bitcoin and Ethereum worth $80M, per Lookonchain. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9oQnU4bThzQThKTm5IWGY1ZG1sYTRpVGl3NVVORXBLWXd3ZHRxQTBZcmVGcnVPNjhDN0RzSGFscl9IVEMwaTVVVGdyYWRhV291TmVUWTlsaWZyN3huRlpyOGN2cWE?oc=5" target="_blank">🐋 WHALE ALERT: Whale opens 20x…

item.title: Trump's World Liberty Financial borrowed millions from a protocol its own advisor co-founded
item.description: Onchain data shows WLFI deposited 5 billion of its own tokens as collateral to borrow stablecoins it then sent to Coinbase Prime, pushing a lending pool to 100% utilization and leaving depositors unable to withdraw.

item.title: BitMEX co-founder donates $5 million to Nigel Farage’s Reform UK party
item.description: Delo did not specify whether he made the donation in fiat currency or crypto, but he expressed support for a proposed U.K. government moratorium on political donations made in cryptoassets

item.title: The TON blockchain just got upgraded and is now 10× faster. Block rate increased 6×. Transactions are now instant, subsecond. This was step 1 of 7 to Make TON Great Again (MTONGA). Next step: cut the already low transaction fees by 6×. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE5CUVYyNWVDdnRsSFRHcVZSekFidlpfVmFBamJ3V1FmYVA5WndpWnVpVjdOOWgySjBGYWs2MlJsUUZ2VTRyT094WlM4T0h1NlAtWnpqRUlNck52dw?oc=5" target="_blank">The TON blockchain just got upgraded and is …

item.title: Operation Atlantic: How Public-Private Collaboration Is Freezing Millions in Crypto Scam Proceeds
item.description: Last week, Chainalysis joined a proactive joint operation co-hosted by the UK’s National Crime Agency (NCA), the US Secret Service,… The post Operation Atlantic: How Public-Private Collaboration Is Freezing Millions in Crypto Scam Proceeds…

item.title: Bitcoin price surfs US PCE inflation as trader keeps $80K BTC price target
item.description: Bitcoin avoids major volatility after the first of the week's two key US inflation reports, while a trader sees a "new upwards leg" coming for BTC price action.

item.title: Mike Novogratz spotlights Helios as $15 billion powerhouse in Galaxy Digital annual report
item.description: The company's Nasdaq debut was a turning point toward infrastructure-led growth in the digital economy, said Novogratz.

item.title: Binance adds prediction market to its app for millions of users
item.description: The integration covers gas costs to lower barriers for retail users. Binance doesn't operate the markets directly, instead providing access to a third-party application.

item.title: Trader loses $3M as leveraged Fartcoin position unwinds on Hyperliquid
item.description: Hyperliquid data showed a 145 million Fartcoin position unwound across wallets, with the platform redistributing about $849,000 in gains to opposing traders.

item.title: DOJ and CFTC seek halt to Arizona action against Kalshi
item.description: The US Justice Department and commodities regulator asked a federal court to block Arizona’s action against Kalshi, arguing federally regulated event contracts fall under CFTC jurisdiction.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin (BTC) trades flat as index declines
item.description: Aave (AAVE) dropped 3.6% and Stellar (XLM) fell 2.7%, leading the index lower.

item.title: North Korean cyber spies are no longer just remote threats
item.description: North Korea’s crypto playbook now spans fake developers, conference contacts and major DeFi exploits reaching deep across the industry.

item.title: Meet the Anti-Trump Crypto Developer Running for Congress in Virginia
item.description: Ethereum developer Joe Schiarizzi says most pro-crypto lawmakers in D.C. “just want a check” and don’t actually understand the technology—or its potential.

item.title: Banks are treading carefully on stablecoins despite market growth, S&P Global says
item.description: Most U.S. lenders remain in a wait-and-see mode as deposit risks, regulatory shifts and new competition complicate strategy, according to the report.

item.title: The $21 billion AI bet: Meta and CoreWeave ink deal for NVIDIA’s next-gen superchips
item.description: Long-term agreement between Meta and CoreWeave signals growing demand for scalable AI compute and inference capacity.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary Bessent says crypto is a "technology the world is adopting." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1jRHhJRVFFaWtaZkRKWm1OMm5yZDVMeTNPYUZNQTdwNW91eGJOUU1sZWNlQm16bmtaWUpEeW1zblM3czZaNWY5N1NsbUtSel9jQWE3OTRDYUNmbGlUa0ItSTJR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary B…

item.title: The Drift Protocol Hack: How Privileged Access Led to a $285 Million Loss
item.description: TL;DR On April 1, 2026, Solana’s Drift Protocol was drained of $285 million (over 50% of its TVL) in a… The post The Drift Protocol Hack: How Privileged Access Led to a $285 Million Loss appeared first on Chainalysis .
